campaign: A5 — Operator rollout + observability/audit + e2e seal + arc close

phase_outcomes.P4: Arc close (docs + whole-arc retrospective + final seal — NO code change). Edited exactly 3 doc files + this progress.json. (1) CLAUDE.md: ONE dense A5 paragraph inserted after the A4 paragraph (before ### Production Deployment), mirroring the A1+A2/A3/A4 style — covers the operator rollout (auto_implement.mode off|shadow|on, env PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODE DEFAULT 'on', distinct from the enabled kill-switch default FALSE; off inert / shadow does the work + pushes + posts a shadowProposal diff but SKIPS submitMergeRequest so cannot land [observe-not-approve, reclaim-skipped] / on autonomous; shadow DRIVE produces vision+epic+tasks + shadows phase 1 + re-parks via shadowProposal{phaseTaskId} idempotence, allLanded false so no false arc_complete; answer-mode mode INDEPENDENT), the dashboard surface (AuditChainCard on detail + AutoImplementMetricsRow on list, client-side, NO server/generate:api change, 'Spend N/A'), the e2e seal (shadow + revert seals; bounded+systemic ALREADY sealed by A2/A3; seals prove orchestration not real-Claude correctness), and the arc-close closing sentence (whole A1-A5 loop COMPLETE, ships behind enabled=false with shadow→on graduation, answer-mode+A1-A4+C1-C4+merge train byte-identical). (2) packages/responder-ref/README.md: a new '## Auto-implement operator rollout (Campaign A5)' section after the A4 Guardrails section (ships OFF; the TWO DISTINCT mode knobs — PM_RESPONDER_MODE answer-gate default shadow vs PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODE write-path default on, independent; off/shadow/on ladder; graduation discipline enabled=false→enabled=true+shadow→on; dashboard surfaces audit chain + land/reject/revert metrics) + a config-table row for PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODE (default on, distinct from PM_RESPONDER_MODE, invalid⇒config error); the stale A1-section 'mode only acquires meaning in P3/P5' text disambiguated in the new section (it describes the ANSWER-mode PM_RESPONDER_MODE) without rewriting the A1 historical narrative. (3) roadmaps/vision-20260613-responder-auto-implement.md: status PROPOSED → SHIPPED/COMPLETE (2026-06-14) with the five-campaign summary + a 'Delivered 2026-06-14' arc note at the foot of '## The arc'; history section intact. Prettier (.md IS in scope — prettier --write .) run on the 3 files, all clean (a prettier list-mangle of the 'e2e + close' line corrected). NO openapi:export / generate:api run (docs don't touch the REST surface). Whole-arc suite GREEN: server 1728, responder 194, shared, integrator, web 482, build/typecheck/lint all pass. Honest residuals stated: ships OFF, seals prove orchestration not real-Claude correctness, spend parked (no token source), single-sha/PM-repo-only. The WHOLE A1-A5 responder-auto-implement arc is COMPLETE.
phase_outcomes.P3: The e2e seal (shadow + revert against the real server). Gap analysis: bounded (A2 seal ~376) + systemic (A3 seal ~950) e2e ALREADY sealed end-to-end incl. C2 origin-notify — NOT rebuilt. P3 added TWO new seals to responder-seal.test.ts (seal-only, one file). Seal A shadow-mode: one responderTick with autoImplementMode:'shadow' → the LOAD-BEARING real-server proof db.select(mergeRequests).where(escalationId=escId) length 0 (shadow never touches the train) + escalation stays acknowledged + a shadowProposal diagnosis message (names branch+diff, no pendingLand/pendingArc) + FakeWorktree.pushCalls recorded pm/escalation-<id> (branch pushed). Seal B revert (TWO-escalation design): esc#1 runs the A2 bounded flow inline (real landed sha BADLAND, resolves #1, not reused); esc#2 raised OPEN + acknowledged by the integrator ai_agent (non-terminal holder); POST .../merge-requests/revert {landedSha, escalationId:esc2} → 201 (revertOf=sha, taskId=null, escalationId=esc2) → scripted land REVERTSHA (branchless, attachLandedRef tolerates null branch) → the post-back drives a REAL acknowledged→answered→resolved on esc2 (gate escalationId!==null && taskId===null) + the independent audit-chain proof GET .../merge-requests?revertOf=<sha> returns the revert row. Scripted land identical to A2/A3; real git-revert sealed in integrator-ref units. WHOLE LOOP sealed end-to-end (bounded+systemic+shadow+revert). server 1728 (+2; seal file 11). build/typecheck/lint green. 14918ff.
phase_outcomes.P2: Dashboard surface + audit chain (web, read-only). Panel A AuditChainCard on the escalation DETAIL page (between Lifecycle and Thread): renders ONLY when ≥1 escalation-linked MR OR a pendingDrive/pendingArc/pendingLand/shadowProposal thread marker — else null (non-auto-implement byte-identical). Shows disposition badge (auto-driven arc / auto-implemented bounded / shadow proposal / arc complete), vision epic Link, the MRs (status/branch/landed_sha/phase taskId Link/View-timeline Link), arc progress (N of M phases landed), revert chain — all DEEP-LINK to the existing MR timeline (link-don't-re-render). extractAuditChain(messages) pure helper reads the metadata markers. Panel B AutoImplementMetricsRow on the LIST page metrics section, gated on auto_implemented_escalations>0: Auto-implemented count + Land/Reject/Revert rates (the A4 sub-block) + Time-to-resolve p50 as the HONESTLY-LABELED mean-time-to-land proxy + 'Spend N/A' (no token source — not fabricated). Assembled CLIENT-SIDE from existing endpoints (?escalationId= MR filter + thread markers carrying epicId) — NO server/responder/generate:api change; the auto_implement type + MR filter fields already generated (P4). One additive client change: getMergeRequests gains escalationId?/revertOf? params + useEscalationMergeRequests(projectId,escalationId) hook (projectId from escalation.projectId, enabled-gated). web 482 tests (+26 affected suites green), typecheck/build/lint green. 3aaef1c.
phase_outcomes.P1: auto_implement.mode off|shadow|on operator rollout. KEPT auto_implement.enabled as the kill-switch (default false, threading untouched); ADDED autoImplementMode:ResponderMode (reuses RESPONDER_MODES) from cfg.autoImplement.mode, DEFAULT 'on' so enabled=true reproduces A1-A4 byte-identically. The load-bearing fix: the write-path off-silence guards previously reused the ANSWER-mode deps.mode==='off' — swapped ONLY the write-path guards (implement case, runImplementForBranch, runDriveSession, advanceArc, reclaim pending-land stall) to deps.autoImplementMode; KEPT the shared pre-fork sniff gate + the answer-outcome dispositions on deps.mode (independent knobs — proven: answer mode 'on' auto-sends while auto-implement 'shadow'). SHADOW divergence: the SOLE land path is submitMergeRequest — shadow computes the --stat diff BEFORE submit, pushes the branch, posts a shadowProposal diagnosis (branch+diff, NO pendingLand/pendingArc), SKIPS submitMergeRequest ⇒ structurally cannot land; stays acknowledged. Shadow DRIVE: produces vision+epic+tasks (observe-safe PM artifacts) then advanceArc shadows phase 1 + re-parks; IDEMPOTENCE fix = next-phase pick excludes tasks with a shadowProposal{phaseTaskId} marker (else re-push forever); allLanded false under shadow ⇒ no false arc_complete. hasShadowProposalMarker reclaim-skip (observe-not-approve — no churn to needs_human, no approval queue, no auto-resolve). off byte-identical (autoImplementMode never consulted when enabled=false). config: PM_AUTO_IMPLEMENT_MODE (default on, ConfigError on invalid). 194 responder (+6, +4 write-path off tests migrated to autoImplementMode:off), 1726 server (A2/A3 seals green on the on-default). build/typecheck/lint green. NO openapi/web/shared change. e29a850.

notes: A5 start — the LAST campaign of the responder-auto-implement arc. Depends on A4 (DONE @ 8e49e4a). P1 = auto_implement.mode off|shadow|on (operator rollout — shadow produces the branch/vision+diff WITHOUT landing, the confidence-building rung; on = autonomous A1-A4 behavior; off inert). P2 = the C4 dashboard surface (auto-implement metrics + the audit chain escalation↔MR/epic↔landed_sha↔revertOf). P3 = the whole-loop e2e seal (bounded + systemic + shadow + revert). P4 = arc close (docs + whole-arc retrospective). Trust-first: shadow is observe-not-approve, NO human-approval gate; the train verify gate is the floor; ships enabled=false. After A5 the WHOLE A1-A5 vision is COMPLETE.
